mapper.select: SELECT START_DATE, END_DATE, CODE_TYPE, CODE_1, CODE_2, NAME, SYS_USERID, SYS_MACHINEID, SYS_TRIGGER, SYS_TIME, SYS_APPDATE FROM M_CODE WHERE (START_DATE <= TO_CHAR(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD')) AND ((TO_CHAR(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') <= END_DATE) OR END_DATE IS NULL)
